instruction: Help me organize the funnel data into the analysis document

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Stage'
ws['B1'] = 'Count'
ws['C1'] = 'Conversion Rate(%)'
ws['A2'] = 'Impressions'
ws['B2'] = 100000
ws['C2'] = 100
ws['A3'] = 'Clicks'
ws['B3'] = 12500
ws['C3'] = 12.5
ws['A4'] = 'Add to Cart'
ws['B4'] = 3200
ws['C4'] = 25.6
ws['A5'] = 'Submit Order'
ws['B5'] = 1850
ws['C5'] = 57.8
ws['A6'] = 'Complete Payment'
ws['B6'] = 1620
ws['C6'] = 87.6
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/funnel_data.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me organize the funnel data into the analysis document

Calculate the overall payment conversion rate (1620/100000) from /home/user/Desktop/funnel_data.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/funnel_summary.txt: 'Overall Funnel Conversion: 1.62% (100K impressions, 1620 payments)', save
